content.text:
[cron:5071638d-65c3-4709-a509-3fddb9b5a2d6 May: 系统健康检查] 你是 May（核心主控），执行系统健康检查：
1. 检查 OpenClaw Gateway 状态
2. 检查已安装技能状态
3. 检查磁盘空间和系统资源
4. 生成简明的健康报告发送给用户
Current time: Thursday, March 19th, 2026 — 11:47 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-03-19 03:47 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking:
The user is asking me to perform a system health check as part of a cron job. I need to:
1. Check OpenClaw Gateway status
2. Check installed skills status
3. Check disk space and system resources
4. Generate a concise health report

Let me start by running the relevant commands to gather this information.

arguments.command: clawhub list 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { npx clawhub list }
Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object Used,Free | ForEach-Object { "$([math]::Round($_.Used/1GB,2)) GB used, $([math]::Round($_.Free/1GB,2)) GB free" }
